issues.description: Missing condition to check if cost (give 1 active DON!! to Leader/Character and trash this Character) can be paid. The DSL should include a conditional action structure reflecting the [Activate: Main] cost requirement.
Target should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with optional selection (up to 1), but missing optionality marker in scope definition.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn' phrasing, but confirm this is the current turn (Your Turn). If it applies during opponent's turn as well, should be 'DuringYourTurn' only.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may give 1 of your active DON!! cards to 1 of your Leader or Character cards and trash this Character: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.
